item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
Now Playing, Loved Tracks, and polish

  • Now Playing macOS notification on track change (opt-in, Settings → General)
  • Loved tracks card in Settings → Activity, with links to each track on Last.fm
  • Two-Mac warning: menu bar surfaces when another client is also scrobbling your account
  • Tightened copy across the app. No more verbose footer paragraphs.
  • 9 test suites (added engine candidate / rule tests)

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
Take Control

  • Pause scrobbling for 30 min, 1 hour, 3 hours, until tomorrow, or indefinitely
  • Ignored artists and tracks with exact or regex matching
  • Custom scrobble threshold sliders
  • Smart content filter for podcasts, audiobooks, and music videos
  • Un-love: heart toggle now reverses
  • Manual "Submit now" button in Activity

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
Initial public release

  • Bring-your-own-key Last.fm credentials
  • Sparkle 2 EdDSA-signed auto-updates
  • 4-step onboarding with deferred permission prompts
  • Custom-drawn app icon and refined menu bar UX
  • Love (heart) tracks from the menu bar
  • Daily and weekly scrobble totals in Activity
  • Diagnostics export for support
  • Sleep and network-aware submission queue
  • Notification-driven playback (no MediaRemote dependency)
